goal: Run HappyTG public Mini App API and frontend through Docker on host ports 4001 and 3008.
changes: Added restart: unless-stopped to Compose services.
Mapped local Docker API/Mini App to host ports 4001/3008 through .env.
Forced API container listener to internal port 4000 so host 4001 maps correctly.
Set local Docker Mini App upstream to miniapp:3001.
Added a Codex Desktop Docker override that mounts host .codex read-only into the API container.

verification.codexDesktopProjects: 12 projects returned through Docker API after read-only mount
verification.codexDesktopControl: mutating app-server controls intentionally unsupported in Docker
verification.browser: HappyTG Mini App loaded with no console errors
verification.verify: exit 0 with unrelated Codex CLI memory warning
